_comment: Vault config TEMPLATE. Copied into {vault_uri}/config.json on initial scaffold. URI-shaped paths are resolved through the path-resolution helper at tools/invisilink/assets/scripts/knowledge-paths.sh. Replace the {TBD_*} placeholders with real URIs during initialization. This file lives in the vault and is NOT committed to the control-plane repo.
_init_instructions: 1. Copy this file to {vault_uri}/config.json. 2. Replace {TBD_VAULT_URI} and {TBD_CONTAINER_URI} with real file:// URIs (e.g., file:///Users/nicholaspark/Library/Mobile%20Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/business-machine-vault/parent). 3. Verify with: knowledge-paths.sh resolve vault_uri. Pre-migration both URIs point to file://./knowledge.
